title: Create: sillyworks :3
description: sillyworks is an addon for Create that adds various helpful items for modpack developers and casual players
body:
Features:
- Realistic Silicon production for electronics production
- Ore Clusters which can be processed for standard resources
- Fully tagged Dust items for most major materials
- Unbreakable tools for Deployers

BE WARY OF INCLUDING SILLYWORKS IN YOUR MODPACKS!! Base sillyworks allows for infinite production of:

- All vanilla and create metals, including netherite
- Blaze burner superheating fuel
- Maybe enchanted golden apples?
- Nearly unbreakable blocks
